commentary_text: nips one away from length on middle, steered to point for a single
Arora to Rohit Sharma, 1 leg bye deflects off the thigh pad to square leg, they trot across for a leg bye
looks to flay that on the up but the ball flies off a thick edge to third man where Muzarabani, on IPL debut, has made a mess of that. Lets it through his legs for four.
punched to point, excellent stop by Anukul Roy moving swiftly to his left.
beauty! This one leave him late as Rickelton is squared up in trying to punch that. He's getting appreciable seam movement. Lovely to watch
throws his bat at that one, but is beaten again by the late away movement. Excellent start by Arora
Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma, no run starts well, hits hard length on off as Rohit rises the bounce and defends to the off side
Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma, no run lovely from Muzarabani. Gets this to angle in and hit good length on middle, Rohit is onto his toes as he bunts it to the leg side
Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma, FOUR runs off a thick inside edge and it flies pas leg stump for four! Rohit was looking to pull in front of square but was rushed into the shot. Lucky runs
Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma,  1 run steered down to square third man for a single. That short of a length delivery was clocked at 138.3kph

Muzarabani to Rickelton, FOUR runs high, very high but the ball plonks near the long-on region and then dribbles away for four. Rickelton got it high on the bat but the intent was the key there. Muzarabani shouldn't mind this.
Muzarabani to Rickelton, no run slower and angling across a length. punched to cover
gets this to bend back in a long way from outside off, Rohit bunts it to the off side and wants a single, but is sent back
Arora to Rohit Sharma,  SIX runs that has been deposited deep into the stands!
flicked down to deep backward square leg for a single, Ramandeep the man
beauty! This one swings from outside leg to outside off, Rickelton is beaten as he tries to ease it into the off side.
throws his hands at that and he's lofted this over extra cover. Properly in the slot, and the width and Ricketon said thank you very much.

pulled and that'll stay hit too! Just about clears deep midwicket. Ended up getting more elevation than distance. But somehow managed to just clear that short boundary on the leg side. Rickelton had to fetch it from outside off, didn't time it as well as he would've liked, but it's six nonetheless.

Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma,  SIX runs more agony for KKR as Rohit sashays down the pitch, makes a bit of room and slaps this over extra cover. Clean swing, right off the middle and that flies over the cover point fence.
Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma,  1 run worked past square leg for a single
Muzarabani to Rickelton,  1 run slower length ball angling away, pushed to point for a single
Muzarabani to Rohit Sharma,  1 run fetches this slower-ball bouncer from way outside off, helps it down past short fine for a single

Muzarabani to Rickelton,  SIX runs clean strike, good strike. Four! This is short and slanting across, and Rickelton unleashes a delightful cross-batted wallop. No chance for mid-on even if he was 10 feet tall.
Muzarabani to Rickelton, no run slower ball angling across, Rickelton throws his bat at that to get a thick edge on the bounce to short third. Dot ball to end but MI are well on the move and on track
Varun to Rohit Sharma, FOUR runs welcomes Varun with a lofted hit over cover!
Varun to Rohit Sharma,  SIX runs this is huge, this is massive, and this is gorgeous!
full on the stumps, tucked to the leg side.
Varun to Rohit Sharma, FOUR runs and more runs! Varun under the pump. Rohit toying with the bowling. Moves across a hint to get inside the line and help it over square leg. Easily done.
bunts this to the man coming in from point. This was pushed through a lot quicker and across the right-hander.
fired full on leg-stump, flicked to long leg for a single. Big over that

Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma,  SIX runs and is welcomed to the crease with a six! Typical Rohit stroke. Tyagi overpitches with this off-cutter and Rohit stays besides the line as he lofts him inside-out to clear extra cover.
Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma,  2 runs tucks it to deep square leg, they saunter back for a second.
Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma, no run much better, shortens his length just a touch, a lot tighter outside off, defended back

Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma,  SIX runs it didn't seem like Rohit had timed it all that well, but even that mishit has sailed over deep midwicket for six! Tyagi dug it in short on middle and off, Rohit swivelled quickly to pull that away, even if not off the middle.
Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma, no run yorker-length outside off, dug out to cover
Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma,  2 runs pulled well, pulled into the gap at deep midwicket.
pushed to long off as they jog the single. Narine starts with one full on the stumps
spins back in a long way as Rohit lunges forward and defends back
skids one through on a length, pushed to long-on for a single
slog-swept into the crowd over deep midwicket! Excellent pick up shot. Narine erred just a hint on the fuller side and Rickelton was ready. Incredible hand-eye coordination.
pushed to cover, dot ball, a rarity
rocks back to slap this straight to cover. A good over under the circumstances despite that six. Just eight off it.
cut way to deep point for a single as Varun continues from around the stumps to Rohit
that's a chance and KKR can't take it. Got to say it was a tough one with Ramandeep running back from cover. But there was an opportunity. Rickelton was looking to go over long-off, didn't time it.
Varun to Rohit Sharma, FOUR runs right in the slot and that has been smashed! Rohit backs away and gets underneath the length to tonk it over cover, one bounce to the ropes.
pushed through quicker on leg stump, worked towards deep midwicket for a single
mistimes a cut to the man at the edge of the ring at cover
works it with the angle towards deep midwicket

another chance, can someone take it? Yes, but outside the boundary. Rickelton slog-sweeps this full delivery from outside off over deep midwicket. Manish Pandey was back-pedalling at the ropes, and even someone of his athletic ability couldn't do much about it.
no run
this one's smashed over deep square! Down one one knee in a jiffy as he picks the length and deposits it deep into the stands. This is exhilarating stuff.
turns it down to long-on as they jog the single, Ricketon raises a half-century now off 24 balls
cut away towards deep point, good work from Anukul Roy
length outside off, punched straight to cover

Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma, (no ball) 1 run high full toss into the body. Rohit is thrown off balance by the height as he looks to pull. The ball rolls to square leg. Tyagi put his hand out in apology immediately. Did that hit Rohit's index finger on the right hand? He's in some pain, but there's
Kartik Tyagi to Rickelton, no run through with the pull long before the ball arrived, hit on the ribs
Kartik Tyagi to Rickelton,  2 runs helped along to deep square and it's put down by Vaibhav Arora
Kartik Tyagi to Rickelton,  1 run hits hard length, Rickelton looks to flay that through the off side, the ball thuds into the top part of the bat as it rolls past the bowler, they jog the single

Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma, FOUR runs more agony for Tyagi and KKR. This time Rohit simply opens the bat face and uses the pace to deflect this behind point. This is MI's highest opening stand in the IPL at Wankhede
Kartik Tyagi to Rohit Sharma,  1 run whips this from outside off towards deep midwicket
Kartik Tyagi to Rickelton,  2 runs pulled to deep square, where Cam Green throws himself around to cut that off
On a length outside leg at 103ks, tucked through midwicket
Full outside off, enough width for Ricks to free his arms, and he gets down on one knee and whacks a flat six
Good comeback from Varun! On a length outside off, and it spins in to beat the cut
Punched out to the off side for a single as this length ball angles in on the stumps from outside off
Loopy and in the blockhole, Rohit eases it down towards long-on
. That's a bit poor from Varun, short and wide. Rickelton just reaches out and slaps it away
Arora to Rohit Sharma, FOUR runs Easy does it! Rohit skips down the track, Vaibhav pulls back his length but it matters not as Rohit pulls it away on the move through midwicket

Arora to Rohit Sharma,  SIX runs That's filth from Arora, a full toss outside off. And Rohit Sharma, in the kind of form he's displaying, is going to put those away every time. Flayed over cover with ease. Rohit doesn't even follow the ball with his eyes
Now Vaibhav goes full outside off, carved over cover to the fielder in the deep
130kph short ball outside off, Rickelton keeps it down as he pulls it out to deep midwicket
Short ball angled across, Rohit watches it sail over him as the umpire calls a wide

Anukul Roy hangs on to a clanger! He has a habit of those! 137kph full ball angled across, Rohit looks to slog it away but it comes off the top edge. Anukul Roy is running back from mid-on and has to put in a full-length dive to hold on to that. The bowler applauds that effort as Rohit walks off. MI
SKY starts off as SKY loves to! Full ball well outside off and going across him, SKY just shuffles across and scoops this in trademark Suryakumar Yadav style over fine leg
Angles this across him, taking it away and Rickelton can't connect
Full and wide, toe-ended down to long-on
Tossed up on middle, tucked to deep midwicket
Skips out to turn this into a low full toss on middle, flicked out to deep midwicket
Anukul ends up tossing this outside the wide line, as he tries to keep it out of SKY's arc
Low full toss on leg, Surya works it down to long-on
Long and mighty six from Rickelton! This is full and very wide, but Rickelton uses his long levers to reach that and clobber it over long-off
Full and straying down leg, SKY edges forward and flicks it away through midwicket, his wristwork giving the fielder in the deep no chance
Great fielding from Kartik Tyagi! This is short and wide and SKY craftily cuts it behind him at backward point but he puts in a good dive to stop that
That's not short enough for the pull but Rickelton only manages to heave it away to deep square leg for a single. That was fired in at 106 clicks
On a length outside off, punched out to deep cover
That'll be a wide. Varun tries to keep it away from Rickelton's range, but ends up going outside the wide line
Cramps Rickelton with a 108kph ball fired in close to off and angled into the batter. Rickelton gets his bat down to keep it out

Pumped down the ground and beats long-off! Full and wide, Rickelton gets low, reaches out, and hits it cross-bat and straight of the fielder. Picked ahead of his compatriot Quinton de Kock, who is an IPL champion with MI, this is a statement knock today from Ryan Rickelton

Kartik Tyagi to Suryakumar, FOUR runs What can you even do there? Ankit bangs in a slower bouncer that veers in. SKY is swaying away and tries to ramp. The ball goes off the gloves onto the bat and goes in the very small gap between short third and a very fine backward point player
Kartik Tyagi to Suryakumar, OUT Tyagi gets some reward for his efforts
Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, FOUR runs Mumbai Indians just having fun now!
Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, no run Now Tyagi takes the pace off as Tilak is early into his swipe across the line
Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, no run Slower short ball angled across him, stays low, and Tilak loses shape as he tries to pull that away

Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, no run Yorker outside off, 144ks, Tilak hams his bat down and it goes off the outside edge to short third on the bounce. Good over from Tyagi. Great pace, great changes of pace as well
Muzarabani to Rickelton, no run Slower ball on a length angled across him, Rickelton chops it towards cover
Muzarabani to Rickelton, 1 run, OUT Muzarabani goes pace off again, and oh wait
Muzarabani to Tilak Varma,  1 run Wide yorker, squeezed out through point
Muzarabani to Hardik, FOUR runs Like SKY and Tilak before him, Hardik starts off with a boundary! This is short and wide, pace off, Hardik waits on it and whacks it away through cover point
Muzarabani to Hardik, FOUR runs Short and wide again, and Pandya punishes it again! Cut away mercilessly. In the gap between deep cover and deep third
Short and wide again, this time he just manages to toe end to cover. Muzarabani lucky that one didn't go in the gap as well

Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma,  1 run Tyagi nearly has a second wicket there as Tilak miscues this pull. Slower bouncer angled across him and he gets this off high on the bat. goes on the bounce to deep midwicket
Slower ball, full outside off, Pandya tries to swing it away leg side but gets an inside edge onto his pads that deflects towards cover
Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, no run Good stuff from Kartik as he nails the wide yorker. Tilak tries to squeeze it away but can't reach it

Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, 1 leg bye Did that pitch outside leg? Looked pretty plumb otherwise! 145kph full delivery around leg and Tilak swings across the line and misses. The ball crashes into his pad. Tyagi convinces Rinku to review.
Bouncer wide of off, pace off, Pandya toe-ends it down to long-on
Kartik Tyagi to Tilak Varma, FOUR runs That was a good over till now, but Tilak has the final word
Short around leg and angled across him. Pandya looks for the cut but can't make contact
Good bouncer, cramping Pandya for room. He looks to pull but gloves it into the square leg region
Arora to Tilak Varma, FOUR runs 125kph short ball sits up nicely, and there's width on offer as well. Tilak stands tall and slashes it over backward point
Full toss on the stumps, Tilak digs it out towards long-off
Short ball angled across, Pandya this time waits on it and dabs it in the gap between deep backward point and deep third. Gets a single

Arora to Tilak Varma, FOUR runs That's just unlucky for the bowler! Nails the yorker as he follows Tilak down the leg side. Tilak jams his bat down and the ball ends up going through his feet and past the keeper. Umpire confers with Tilak and gives it as runs, even though it looked like it went off
On a length outside off, Pandya drills it down to long-off
On a length around off, clipped out through midwicket
Full outside off, Pandya tries to swing it away to deep midwicket. His right hand came off the handle

Slowed down to 83.1kph, it's an offbreak outside off. Tilak looks to go downtown but picks out Manish Pandey, who is a safe pair of hands Tilak Varma c sub (MK Pandey) b Narine 20 (14b 4x4 0x6 25m) SR: 142.85
On a length outside off, punched down to long-off
Hardik Pandya levels the scores as he takes on this half-tracker. Pulls it away wide of long-off, an d MI are one run away

And Mumbai Indians win their first season-opener since 2012! And they do it by pulling off their biggest chase! This is full on middle and Naman Dhir just makes room and drills it down the ground. Mumbai Indians begin with a comprehensive victory!
